description: Canonical Aero language specification. This is the BASELINE source-of-truth for the lexer's language tables. The optimizer reads this file and writes experimental, frequency-tuned variants ONLY to build_sandbox/config/language_spec.json -- it never mutates this file.

custom_errors.@: Unexpected character '@' - not a valid token
custom_errors.#: Unexpected character '#' - not a valid token
custom_errors.$: Unexpected character '$' - not a valid token
custom_errors.~: Unexpected character '~' - not a valid token
custom_errors.`: Unexpected character '`' - not a valid token
